dashboard.title: Good morning
dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening across your spaces today.
dashboard.scopeSubtitleRegion: Bookings in the regions you manage.

search.title: Find a Resource
search.subtitle: Search across rooms, vehicles, and equipment.
search.tryAgain: Try another time slot or relax the filters.

booking.title: Booking title
booking.qr: Scan this QR at the room to check in
booking.successDesc: An invite is on its way to your inbox.
booking.pendingDesc: We'll email you when it's reviewed.
booking.markPrivateHelp: Only you and System Admin will see the title, organiser and meeting URL. Calendars show "Reserved" to everyone else.
booking.noRoomsSlot: No rooms available in that slot.
booking.seriesCapHelp: Series are capped at 100 occurrences. Conflicting occurrences are skipped automatically.
booking.name: Name

myBookings.title: My Bookings
myBookings.subtitle: Upcoming, pending, and recently past reservations.

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.subtitle: Review bookings that need your sign-off.
approvals.emptyDesc: When someone requests a room you approve, it'll appear here.
approvals.rejectHelp: The requester will be notified with your reason.
approvals.reasonPh: Conflicting maintenance / room unavailable / outside policy…
approvals.pendingDecision: Pending bookings waiting on your decision.
approvals.reasonRequired: A reason is required and shown to the requester.
approvals.delegateHelp: Reassign the current pending step to another approver. Recorded on the timeline.

approvalChain.title: Approval Chain
approvalChain.subtitle: Configure multi-level approval policies for sensitive bookings.
approvalChain.name: Rule name
approvalChain.emptyDesc: Add a rule and any matching booking will be routed through your chain instead of single-step approval.
approvalChain.priorityHelp: Lower numbers win. Resource-specific rules typically use 10–50; tenant-wide defaults 200+.
approvalChain.minGradeHelp: Approver must be at this rank or higher.
approvalChain.autoAfterHoursHelp: If still pending after this many hours, the level auto-approves. 0 = manual only.
approvalChain.parallelHelp: If on, any single eligible approver can clear this level.
approvalChain.dependenciesHelp: Tick which earlier levels must finish before this level becomes actionable. Leave empty for the default linear flow (waits for the previous level only).
approvalChain.linearDefault: Default: waits for the previous level.
approvalChain.previewEmpty: Add at least one level to see the chain shape.
approvalChain.simulatorHelp: Pick a resource and a user — we'll show whether this rule's scope matches and which levels the user could action. Authoritative gating still happens on the server.
approvalChain.scopeNoMatch: Scope does not match this resource
approvalChain.eligibleRole: Has the required role and grade
approvalChain.eligibleAdmin: System Admin can act on this open level
approvalChain.routingSubtitle: Multi-step routing rules. Lowest priority wins; specific resource rules override asset-type defaults.
approvalChain.routingEmpty: No approval rules yet. Create one to route bookings through a multi-step chain.
approvalChain.confirmDeleteRule: Delete this rule? Existing chains keep their materialised steps.
approvalChain.dependenciesInline: Dependencies — must complete before this step. Empty = previous step only.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Receive HMAC-signed event callbacks for downstream automation.
webhooks.eventsHelp: Select which events should fire a POST. We re-send up to 5 times with exponential backoff (30s → 2h).
webhooks.emptyDesc: Subscribe an external system to receive booking lifecycle events.
webhooks.secretBody: Use it to verify the X-MRBS-Signature header on every incoming POST. We will not show it again.
webhooks.ssrfHelp: The endpoint must be https. We block RFC1918, loopback, link-local, and the AWS / GCP / Azure metadata addresses to prevent SSRF.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect Microsoft 365, Teams, Google and Zoom — bookings push to room mailboxes automatically.
integrations.msDesc: Push bookings to Outlook room mailboxes via Microsoft Graph. Use the OAuth2 client-credentials flow with Calendars.ReadWrite + User.Read.All app permissions.
integrations.teamsDesc: Search and book rooms from a Teams chat compose box. Download the manifest, side-load it, and point the bot endpoint at https://your-host/api/v1/teams/messages.
integrations.secretHelp: Stored obfuscated; never returned in subsequent API responses.
integrations.step1: Register an application in Azure AD (Microsoft Entra → App registrations → New).
integrations.step2: Under API permissions add Calendars.ReadWrite + User.Read.All as Application permissions and grant admin consent.
integrations.step3: Under Certificates & secrets create a Client Secret value (copy it immediately, it's shown only once).
integrations.step4: Paste the directory (tenant) ID, application (client) ID, and the secret value above and Save.
integrations.step5: Click Test connection. Then map each room resource to a mailbox UPN under the Room mailboxes tab.
integrations.mailboxesHelp: Map each bookable resource to its Outlook room mailbox UPN. Only mapped resources sync.
integrations.confirmRemoveMapping: Remove this mapping? Future bookings won't sync to that mailbox.
integrations.mailboxMapHelp: Each mapping ties an FSD room to a Microsoft 365 mailbox. Outlook events for the room are mirrored from / to the mailbox via Microsoft Graph subscriptions.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Configure what each role in this tenant can do. The 5 built-in roles still gate menu visibility, but every action is checked against this matrix.
permissions.help: Changes apply on save. Users may need to refresh their token (logout / login) before reduced permissions take effect.
permissions.matrixSubtitle: Per-role permission matrix. Changes are audited as a warning event.
permissions.matrixHelp: Each tick grants a role one permission key. Role membership is set per-user; permissions are inherited from the role.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Usage, utilisation, and audit data — exportable for any time window.
reports.usageHelp: Per-resource booking counts, utilisation hours, peak time. CSV is human-readable; XLSX is styled for stakeholders.
reports.realtimeHelp: Operational dashboards from Prometheus and the API metrics endpoint.
reports.pageSubtitle: Operational reports and personal data export.
reports.dsarHelp: Download a machine-readable JSON bundle of your profile, bookings and audit history (GDPR Art. 20 / HK PDPO DPP6). The export is recorded in the audit log.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Your session, language, theme, and identity attributes from this tenant's directory.
profile.scanInstruction: Scan with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.
profile.passkeysHelp: Sign in without typing a password using a hardware security key, phone, or built-in authenticator.
profile.enterCodeToDisarm: Enter a current code to disarm.

scim.title: SCIM
scim.subtitle: Issue tokens that Azure AD (or any SCIM client) uses to push user lifecycle events into this tenant.
scim.howTo: Set up Azure AD enterprise app provisioning
scim.step1: In Azure Portal → Enterprise Applications → New application → Create your own (Non-gallery).
scim.step2: Open the app, go to Provisioning → Set Mode to Automatic.
scim.step3: Paste the Tenant URL above and a token issued here. Click Test connection.
scim.step4: Map userPrincipalName → userName, mailNickname → externalId, then turn provisioning On.
scim.noTokensDesc: Create your first SCIM token to allow Azure AD to push users.
scim.name: Name
scim.issueHelp: Choose a label so you can identify which provisioner this token belongs to.
scim.savedBody: We do not store the plaintext — copy it into Azure AD and never share it. You can revoke it from this page at any time.
scim.confirmRevoke: Revoke this token? Existing provisioning clients will fail immediately.
scim.idpHelp: Configure your IdP (Azure AD, Okta, JumpCloud) with this endpoint and a bearer token issued below.

admin.title: Tenant Studio
admin.subtitle: Configure how your organization sees the product.
admin.previewLabel: How your users will see it
admin.dashboardWidgetsHelp: Drag to reorder. These appear on every user's home screen.
admin.sidebarModulesHelp: Hide modules your tenant doesn't need.
admin.hkoEnabledHelp: Auto-suspend no-show penalties when T8 / Black Rain is active.
admin.govhkHolidaysHelp: Nightly sync from the official 1823 calendar.
admin.savedDesc: Your changes are live for everyone in this tenant.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Rooms, vehicles, equipment, and split / composite spaces.
resources.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this resource? It will be hidden from new bookings.
resources.saveFirst: Save the parent resource before splitting.
resources.alreadySplit: This is a composite/parent resource. Sub-resources are managed separately.
resources.name: Name
resources.floorPositionHelp: Where this resource appears on the admin floor plan. Coordinates are a percentage of the floor-plan image (0 = left/top edge, 100 = right/bottom). Leave at 0/0 to keep it off the plan.
resources.emptyDesc: Create the first room, vehicle, or equipment item.
resources.compositeHelp: Mark this as a parent that can be sub-divided (e.g. a basketball court split into 3 badminton courts). Booking the parent blocks all children, and vice versa.
resources.childNamesHelp: Press Enter or click + to add each name
resources.bookingModeHelp: Exclusive — only one booking holds the resource per slot. Shared — up to N concurrent bookings (gym = 10, classroom = 20).
resources.sharedCapacityHelp: Maximum number of overlapping bookings allowed for the same time window.
resources.regionHelp: The wide geographic bucket: Hong Kong, Kowloon, or New Territories.
resources.locationHelp: Building or floor inside the region. Leave blank to use the region as the location.
resources.locationPh: Building / floor (optional; defaults to the region)
resources.detailsAclHelp: Roles ticked here additionally see the meeting subject, organiser, and meeting URL for bookings on this resource. Useful for public-facing rooms.
resources.detailsAclFloorNote: Owner, System / Security / Room Admin and Secretary always see details. System Admin is the audit backstop and cannot be locked out.

resourceTypes.title: Resource types
resourceTypes.subtitle: Define the asset taxonomy for your tenant. Built-ins ship with sensible defaults; you can also add your own (Gym, Studio, Boat, Drone…).
resourceTypes.empty: No resource types yet — create your first one
resourceTypes.label: Display label
resourceTypes.confirmDelete: Delete this resource type? Existing resources keep their type but new options will hide it.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage who can sign in and what role they hold.
users.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this user? They won't be able to sign in.

departments.title: Departments
departments.subtitle: Organisational units for grouping resources and reporting.
departments.name: Name

holidays.title: Holidays
holidays.subtitle: Block bookings on public holidays. Sync from gov.hk or upload an ICS file.
holidays.blockerHelp: Block new bookings on this date

services.title: Catering & Services
services.subtitle: Manage bookable add-ons like catering, AV equipment, or support staff.
services.name: Name
services.emptyDesc: Create a category first, then add services to it.
services.confirmDeleteSvc: Delete this service? It will be removed from any future bookings.
services.confirmDeleteCat: Delete this category? Services within it will become uncategorised.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.subtitle: View and manage all bookings across your resources.
bookings.drawHelp: Click and drag on the canvas to draw rooms or walls. Erase tool removes a shape on click.
bookings.pinsHelp: Drag resource pins to reposition. Click an unplaced resource to drop it in the centre.
bookings.emptyDesc: There are no bookings matching your current filters.
bookings.attendedHelp: Flip the booking to Checked In on the organiser's behalf — used at reception when the booker forgot to scan.
bookings.noShowHelp: Flip the booking to No Show. Audited; reason is required.

visitors.title: Visitors today
visitors.subtitle: Reception dashboard. Mark visitors in / out and review the day's expected guests.

sensors.title: IoT Sensors
sensors.subtitle: Enrol, monitor, and inspect the building's occupancy / environmental sensors.
sensors.enrolHelp: After enrolment the shared secret is shown ONCE. Copy it onto the device immediately.
sensors.secretOnce: Shared secret — copy it now; it will not be shown again.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Run a monthly rollup, review charge-back lines, and issue invoices to cost centres.
invoices.empty: No invoices yet. Run a rollup for a month with bookings to create drafts.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage how MRBS notifies you and shares your bookings.
settings.mfaHelp: Step-up with a 6-digit code from Google Authenticator (or any compatible app: Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, 1Password).
settings.mfaScan: Scan this URL with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code:
settings.mfaDisarmCode: Enter a current code to confirm
settings.calendarHelp: Paste this URL into Apple Calendar, Outlook, or Google Calendar to see your bookings in your personal calendar.
settings.pushHelp: Get a desktop alert when a booking is approved, cancelled, or about to start.
settings.pushUnsupported: Your browser does not support Web Push.
settings.privacyHelp: Download everything we store about you, or permanently erase your account.
settings.mfaStepInstall: Install Google Authenticator on your phone (App Store or Google Play).
settings.mfaStepScan: Open the app, tap “+”, choose “Scan a QR code”, and point your camera at this image:
settings.mfaStepManual: Can’t scan? Choose “Enter a setup key” and type this:
settings.mfaManualHint: Account: your username · Type of key: Time-based
settings.mfaStepCode: Enter the 6-digit code the app is showing right now:

login.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
login.mustChangeHelp: Your administrator issued a temporary password. Choose a new one to continue.

adminUsers.title: Users
adminUsers.forceReset: Require password reset on first login

adminDepartments.title: Departments
adminDepartments.subtitle: Organisational units used for permissions and reporting.
adminDepartments.deleteConfirm: Delete department "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
adminDepartments.emptyDescription: Create your first department to start grouping users and resources.
adminDepartments.name: Name

adminFloorPlans.title: Floor Plans
adminFloorPlans.name: Name
adminFloorPlans.pinHelp: Drag pins to move • double-click to remove • use the right panel to add pins
adminFloorPlans.selectPlan: Select a plan or create one.
adminFloorPlans.clickToDrop: Click again on the canvas to drop
adminFloorPlans.placeHelp: Click the room name then click the canvas to drop the pin where you want it.

adminSensors.title: Sensors
adminSensors.label: Label
adminSensors.secretBody: This secret is shown only once. Provision the device with it before closing.

adminHolidays.title: Holidays
adminHolidays.empty: No holidays configured. Try "Sync gov.hk" to pull the official feed.
adminHolidays.blockNew: Block new bookings on this date

adminBookings.title: All Bookings
adminBookings.subtitle: Tenant-wide booking activity. Use multi-select for bulk actions.
adminBookings.noShowPrompt: Reason for marking as No Show?
adminBookings.emptyDesc: Try widening the date range or clearing the filters.
